title: Trial Chambers: Parched Spawners
description: This datapack adds Parched trial spawners to Trial Chambers.
body:
This datapack allows Parched trial spawners to generate within Trial Chambers. The probability of a Parched spawner being selected is the same as that of a Skeleton, Stray, or Bogged spawner (i.e., 25 %); thus, on average, 1 out of every 4 Trial Chambers will feature Parched as ranged mobs.

![A group of Parched in a Trial Chamber.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7v25B0Py/images/61980f7c8820be778d167e0473c2e96047012d11.png)

# Changes
- Adds Parched trial spawners to Trial Chambers

You can submit your feedback or bug reports on my [Feedback Form](https://forms.gle/vGUBdSqqPh6tTkig9).

No additional content will be added.
